## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to review content marketing progress and discuss next steps for improving conversions.](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Blog traffic has increased significantly (86% in last 28 days), but conversions remain low](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)
  - [Team needs to implement lead magnets and improve CRO on blog pages to capitalize on increased traffic](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Backlink strategy needs to be implemented to improve rankings for target keywords](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [More comprehensive reporting on key metrics and target keywords is needed](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)

## Topics

### Content Marketing Progress

  - [Blog impressions and clicks nearly doubled in last 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [New content generating \~330 clicks per week, refresh content \~50 clicks](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=85.0)
  - [Total of 191 new content pieces written so far](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Overall blog clicks increased 86% in last 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

### Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO)

  - [Current CRO efforts insufficient; very few organic submissions despite traffic increase](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Need to implement lead magnets (e.g. case studies, webinar promotions) on blog pages](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Suggested updates:](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
      - [Replace "Book a Demo" CTAs with "See on Your Site" (magic button)](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
      - [Add banner promoting recent Beach Favor webinar](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1100.0)
      - [Consider implementing chatbot for lead capture](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1190.0)

### SEO Performance

  - [Some target keywords (e.g. "shoppable video") showing improvement in last 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1827.0)
  - [Overall site (non-blog) seeing 16% more impressions, 6% more clicks in last 28 days](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Need more comprehensive reporting on target keyword performance month-over-month](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1903.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Jimmy emphasized importance of backlinks for improving keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
  - [Requested access to outbound email systems to pursue content collaboration opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
  - [Can to follow up with team about providing necessary access](https://fathom.video/share/WxBia5S__AL16cq7zmCHmjiYqKGsjMSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2073.0)

## Next Steps

1.  Jorge to update blog CTAs with "magic button" and add webinar promotion banner
2.  Jimmy to create comprehensive report on target keyword performance (impressions/clicks) month-over-month
3.  Can to follow up on providing access for backlink outreach efforts
4.  Team to implement lead magnets and improve CRO on blog pages
5.  Jimmy to combine total clicks from new and refresh content in weekly reporting
6.  Continue monitoring overall site performance for improvements from increased blog traffic
